author: driver--build-ferrum-phase-0-coordinator
content: Result: ferrum-core-types implemented — 21 source files, ~4200 lines, 98 tests passing, 0 clippy warnings. NdArray ownership model (Array/View/ViewMut/ArcArray/CowArray), Element trait (17 types), DType enum, FerrumError, introspection, iterators, Display formatting all complete.
